title: CKB LTD Set of 3 Metal Herb Plant Pots with Drip Tray Traditional Indoor Windowsill Coloured Planter Box for The Kitchen Grow Your Own Herbs for Cooking (Sage Green)
features: Set of 3 Metal Herb/Plant Pots with Drip Tray. This 3 pot planter set is perfect for growing kitchen herbs or other small house plants. The herb plant pot set will look great on any worktop, windowsill or table. Ideally, put it anywhere you can keep an eye on your plants, to make sure they don't dry out.

A classic style set of 3 metal plant pots with a drainage hole and a metal tray with handles. A perfect and easy solution for keeping any living herbs or small plants watered and cared for. Any 4" pot fit straight inside which provides you with an easy solution for keeping your favourite herbs fresh and alive for longer.

The metal tray has handles and will catch any excess water - Each pot has a drainage hole so that the soil won't get waterlogged, any excess water will leak into the tray. Both the tray and pots are made from powder-coated steel -Powder Coated finished surfaces are resistant to scratching, wearing, fading, chipping and won't corrode or rust.

The metal plant pots are ribbed for extra strength and style. This set looks great and will look great sitting on any kitchen windowsill. Place the tray anywhere you like as long as it is a bright area for your living herbs/plants to grow. Makes a perfect gift for anyone who loves a salad or cooks fresh food.

Sage Green Colour - Included: 3 x Metal plant pots. 1 x Metal drip tray - Pot Size: 4.5" (11.5cm) diameter x 4" tall (10cm) - Tray Size: (not including handles): 32cm wide x 3cm tall -Tray Size: (including handles): 39cm wide x 5cm tall - Pot Capacity: 600ml / 0.6ltr. - Material: Matt powder-coated metal - The metal plant pots are ribbed for style and rigidity - Also available in 3 Colours: White, White Chalk and Charcoal Grey.
